title: WaveDrive Propulsion System (ENAUTIC)
description: Core propulsion and foil control technology powering WaveFlyer Volaré. Enables autonomous stabilization and efficient hydrofoiling. Claims cover the integrated drive-and-foil-control approach.
relevance: HIGH — direct competitor tech. ENAUTIC's core IP. Defines what Kai Concepts cannot copy.

title: Hydrofoil Boat with Counter-Rotating Motor Pod (Candela)
description: Covers a boat with two hydrofoils where the rear strut carries a motor pod with counter-rotating propellers, which is turnable for steering. This is essentially the C-Pod system architecture.
relevance: MEDIUM — Candela's core drivetrain patent. Relevant if Kai Concepts uses similar pod-on-strut approach.

title: Multi-Purpose Electric Hydrofoil
description: A hydrofoil assembly adapted to be removably attached to a watercraft. Covers modular hydrofoil attachment systems. Published 2023.
relevance: LOW — broad modular attachment claim. Monitor for grant.

title: Hydrofoil Vessel (Norwegian PCT)
description: New WIPO PCT application from Norway for a hydrofoil vessel design. Filed October 2024. Details limited as still pending publication.
relevance: LOW — monitor for claims as it publishes.

title: Watercraft with Hydrofoil (SubSeaSail)
description: A watercraft including a board with top/bottom surface and a hydrofoil attached to a strut. Covers hydrofoil board attachment geometries.
relevance: LOW — covers board-style craft, not seated platforms. Monitor for reissue/continuation.

title: Electric Watercraft Design (UNI Electric Watercraft Group)
description: Design patent for an electric watercraft — covers ornamental design.
relevance: LOW — design patent, doesn't block functional innovation.
